articles.title: Stroll explains what he’s learned after almost 10 years in F1
articles.summary: Lance Stroll has given some insight into how much he has grown as an F1 driver since his arrival on the grid almost 10 years ago, as well as highlighting the key lessons he has picked up along the way.

articles.title: The key way Ferrari have looked to tackle tyre degradation
articles.summary: Ferrari’s new rear wheel rims were a significant part of the upgrade the team brought to Barcelona last week and they have been credited with improving the thermal degradation of the car’s tyres.

articles.title: Laura Mueller on settling in as Ocon’s race engineer
